subject: phonics
activity_templates: A kindergarten beginning-sound worksheet. Six cute cartoon pictures each with a blank line to write the starting letter. A letter key across the top helps the child. {{character}} cheers at the right.

A 'what's the first sound?' worksheet. Four rows. Each row: one big cartoon picture and three letter choices (A/B/C bubbles) — child circles the correct starting letter. {{character}} points to the first choice.

A sound-matching worksheet. Left column: 5 letters. Right column: 5 cute cartoon pictures. Child draws lines to match each letter with the picture that starts with that sound. {{character}} waves in the center.

A sort-by-sound worksheet. Two boxes labeled with two different starting letters (e.g. 'B' and 'M'). Below, 6 pictures scattered. Child writes the correct letter under each picture. {{character}} stands between the boxes.
